description: Maintain a complete, validated history of odometer readings for each vehicle, detecting rollbacks and anomalous jumps, with an approval workflow for corrections.

actors.name: Driver
actors.description: Submits odometer readings at key events (fuel fill-up, service, trip end)

actors.name: Fleet Manager
actors.description: Reviews flagged anomalies and approves or rejects corrections

actors.name: System
actors.description: Validates each reading against the previous and flags anomalies

values.name: validated
values.description: Reading passed all checks and is accepted

values.name: flagged
values.description: Reading failed validation — possible rollback or anomaly

values.name: approved
values.description: Fleet manager reviewed and approved a flagged/corrected reading

values.name: rejected
values.description: Flagged reading rejected as erroneous; excluded from history

transitions.description: Reading is >= previous reading and within anomaly thresholds
Reading is a rollback or exceeds the anomaly jump threshold
Manager reviews and confirms the flagged reading is correct
Manager rejects the reading as erroneous

reading_monotonic.description: Each reading must be >= the previous validated reading; a lower value is treated as a rollback

rollback_requires_approval.description: A rollback is automatically flagged and requires fleet manager approval before inclusion in history

anomaly_threshold.description: A distance delta greater than the configured maximum_daily_km threshold triggers an anomaly flag

date_not_future.description: Reading date cannot be in the future

date_progression.description: Reading date must be >= the date of the previous reading for the same vehicle

update_master_on_valid.description: The current odometer on the vehicle master is updated only from validated or approved readings

rejected_retained_for_audit.description: Rejected readings are retained in history for audit purposes but excluded from calculations

given.description: New reading is at least equal to the last validated reading

given: distance_delta is within the configured anomaly threshold
reading_date is not in the future
reading_validated.result: Reading is accepted, vehicle last odometer is updated, odometer-based maintenance schedules are re-evaluated

given.description: Submitted reading is less than the last validated reading

then.description: Alert fleet manager of a suspected odometer rollback

rollback_flagged.result: Reading is held in flagged status pending fleet manager review

given: distance_delta exceeds the configured maximum_daily_km threshold

then.value: Distance delta exceeds maximum daily threshold

then.description: Alert fleet manager of an unusually large odometer jump

anomaly_flagged.result: Reading is flagged for manager review

given: fleet manager reviews and confirms the reading is valid
correction_approved.result: Approved reading is included in the odometer history and updates the vehicle's last odometer

given: fleet manager confirms the reading is erroneous
reading_rejected.result: Reading is excluded from calculations and marked as rejected in the audit trail

errors.message: This odometer reading is lower than the previous validated reading. Please verify and resubmit, or contact the fleet manager.
Odometer reading date cannot be in the future.

events.name: odometer.reading_validated
events.description: An odometer reading passed validation and has been added to the vehicle history

events.name: odometer.rollback_detected
events.description: A submitted reading is lower than the last validated odometer value

events.name: odometer.anomaly_flagged
events.description: An odometer jump exceeds the maximum daily threshold

events.name: odometer.correction_approved
events.description: A fleet manager approved a flagged odometer reading

events.name: odometer.reading_rejected
events.description: A fleet manager rejected an erroneous odometer reading

related.reason: Vehicle master stores the last validated odometer which anchors each new reading
Fuel log entries submit odometer readings that are validated by this feature
Validated odometer readings trigger re-evaluation of odometer-based maintenance schedules
Service records include odometer readings that feed into this validation history

goals.description: Maintain a complete, validated history of odometer readings for each vehicle, detecting rollbacks and anomalous jumps, with an approval workflow for corrections.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts

human_checkpoints: before transitioning to a terminal state

tradeoffs.reason: workflow steps must complete correctly before proceeding
